name: result_marks
description: Result mark pair, same knitted family: WIN = a proud gold knitted medal with a woven laurel ring and a red-teal yarn ribbon; FAIL = the same medal shape in muted pewter tones, cracked down the middle with a small sad tangle of unraveled yarn at its base.
prompt_extra: same medal silhouette in both cells; only the emotional state changes (radiant vs cracked-and-dim)

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
